title: Convert an if-truthiness check to proper guard+pattern
prompt: Rewrite `def adult?(user) do if user.age && user.age >= 18, do: true, else: false end` as two function heads. One head matches `%{age: age}` with a guard `when is_integer(age) and age >= 18` and returns `true`. The other matches anything and returns `false`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.AgeCheck do ... end`.
